messages: %s Even if you had one of those, I doubt I would want it.
%s I'd buy it, but I just fed my dragon and am broke!
%s You'll need more gold than that!
%s I don't need to buy those - I'm a witch! Muaha!
%s Good choice, my pretty! %d coins please.
%s Ahh! Just the thing I needed. Have %d coins.
